text: I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity as I traverse these clean, modern corridors and enter a space dedicated to research and development. The emptiness of the hallway suggests potential and possibility, while the vibrant R+D display evokes excitement about human ingenuity. Here, the present merges with the future; I sense that I am witnessing the cusp of creative thought, and I feel invigorated by the energy of innovation all around me.
